headline: Russia Pummels Ukraine with 150-Missile Overnight Barrage as IDF Kills Golani Officer in Lebanon
subheadline: IDF demolished a 200-meter Hezbollah tunnel in Majdal Zoun while Russia struck Zaporizhzhia with guided bombs, injuring a 5-year-old boy.
lede: Russia launched a massive combined overnight strike on Ukraine employing 2 anti-ship missiles, 6 ballistic missiles, and 142 drones, with impacts confirmed at 11 locations. In southern Lebanon, IDF forces killed Golani officer Cpt. David Hazutt during a clash with a Hezbollah gunman in Deir Siryan and subsequently destroyed a Hezbollah underground tunnel exceeding 200 meters in length and 25 meters deep in Majdal Zoun. Israel also reported killing three senior Hamas commanders, including a naval police chief, in a Gaza strike, while a reported US-Iran agreement to cease attacks offered a potential diplomatic off-ramp.

sections.title: Massive Russian Barrage Hits 11 Locations
sections.body: Russia conducted a large-scale combined overnight strike on Ukraine employing 2 anti-ship missiles, 6 ballistic missiles, and 142 drones, with impacts at 11 locations and debris falls at 13 others. Russian tactical aviation launched guided aviation bombs on Donetsk and Kharkiv oblasts, while Zaporizhzhia was struck with KABs, injuring at least 8 people including a 5-year-old boy in serious condition. Ukrainian forces responded with Shahed-136-type drones launched from the Kursk direction in approximately 20 groups and from the Millerovo area in about 6 groups, tracked across Kharkiv, Dnipropetrovsk, Donetsk, Zaporizhzhia, Chernihiv, and Kirovograd oblasts. All districts of Kherson oblast are fully or partially without power, and the Russian assault on Konstantinovka in DPR is nearing completion with encircled AFU units described as disorganized.

sections.title: IDF Kills Golani Officer, Destroys Hezbollah Tunnel
sections.body: IDF forces killed Cpt. David Hazutt and wounded another soldier during a clash with a Hezbollah gunman in Deir Siryan, southern Lebanon, then struck Hezbollah sites in the area. The Israeli Air Force hit Hezbollah operatives armed with RPGs in the Nabatieh area and destroyed a Hezbollah rocket launcher threatening Israeli forces. IDF demolished a large Hezbollah underground tunnel in Majdal Zoun measuring over 200 meters in length and more than 25 meters deep. Israel reported killing three senior Hamas commanders, including a naval police chief, in a strike in Gaza, while the Palestinian army detonated residential buildings near a mosque in Bani Suhail, east of Khan Younis. A militant fired at Israeli forces in the southern Golan region of Syria without causing casualties, and a reported US-Iran agreement to cease attacks emerged alongside Iran's commemoration of the Sardasht chemical massacre.

sections.title: Intelligence Assessment
sections.body: The operational tempo is intensifying on both fronts, with Russia conducting its largest combined missile-drone strikes of the period and Ukraine responding with multi-axis Shahed-type drone campaigns across at least 8 oblasts. In the Middle East, Israel's decapitation strikes against senior Hamas leadership and systematic destruction of Hezbollah underground infrastructure signal a sustained campaign to degrade proxy capabilities, though Hezbollah continues to engage with small arms and RPGs along the Lebanon border. The reported US-Iran de-escalation could reduce direct state-level confrontation but does not eliminate proxy activities, while Russia's near-complete assault on Konstantinovka marks a critical phase ahead of the anticipated Slavyansk-Kramatorsk battle.
